title: helianthemum vulgare var. mutabile
intro: Helianthemum vulgare var. mutabile, also known as Rockrose or Frostweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Cistaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including sore throats, coughs, and skin irritations, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum vulgare var. mutabile include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions.
